framework.name: MCP referenced as agent protocol needing auth
framework.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) explicitly cited as a protocol agents use that needs identity/auth integration. Three MCP references in bibliography. Shows awareness of Anthropic's protocol in the standards conversation.
framework.raw_quote: it would go through a standard OAuth 2.0 flow, obtaining an access token scoped specifically to read project documentation and code structures that the developer has authorized

source.title: A Novel Zero-Trust Identity Framework for Agentic AI - arXiv
